title: Retrieving specific problem details
content: Use the 'getProblem' method when you have a specific problem identifier and require the complete problem statement, solution, answer, and metadata. You must provide the 'subject' and the 'problem_id' (a numeric string). You can optionally set 'response_format' to 'json' or 'markdown'.
examples: Give me the solution for math problem 12345.
Show me the full content of physics problem 9876.
Fetch details for informatics problem ID 55432 in markdown format.
